scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter server test && pnpm --filter client test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter client lint && pnpm --filter server lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter shared typecheck && pnpm --filter server typecheck && pnpm --filter client typecheck
